name: Kotopoulo Me Bamyes- Chicken with Okra
recipeIngredient: 500 g Prepared okra (500 g ñ lb)
recipeInstructions:
Cooking time: 1 1/2 hours
1. Cut the chicken into serving pieces and wipe dry.
2. Melt butter in a heavy saucepan or flameproof casserole and brown the chicken on all sides. Remove to a plate when browned.
3. Reduce heat and add onion and garlic. Fry gently until onion is transparent, then add remaining ingredients. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, lightly brown the prepared okra in a little butter and set aside.
5. Return the chicken to the pan, cover, and simmer gently for an additional 45 minutes or until the chicken is tender. Add the browned okra about 20 minutes before the end of cooking time.
6. Remove the bay leaf and cinnamon bark, and serve with boiled or mashed potatoes.
From: "The Complete Middle East Cookbook" by Tess Mallos ISBN: 1 86302 069 1
